name: Fall Feast- Pork Tenderloin with Fall Vegeta
recipeIngredient: 3 small Onions, peeled and cut into eight sections through the root
recipeInstructions:
1. Substitute other vegetables if you prefer but cut to the same size for even cooking.
2. Cut peppers and zucchini into 1-inch dice. Peel onion and cut into eight sections through the root.
3. Preheat oven to 350°F (180°C).
4. In a skillet, brown pork tenderloins on all sides over medium heat. Remove to a baking dish large enough to hold pork and vegetables.
5. Season pork with salt, pepper, and rosemary.
6. Add vegetables to the skillet and sauté until slightly brown and crisp-tender, about 5 minutes. Surround pork with vegetables.
7. Bake uncovered for 25 minutes, or until pork juices are no longer pink. Pour wine and pan juices into the skillet, add apple juice, and bring to a boil.
8. Reduce by half. Stir in red current jelly and simmer another minute.
9. Slice pork into thin slices, pour sauce over pork, and garnish with vegetables.
